method.node: A positive constant with an LJPW coordinate fit.
method.relation: A directed transformation A -> B represented by ratio B/A.
method.compatibility: Relation-to-relation similarity over operator mix, signed operator shape, direction, strength, purpose archetype, and fit support.
method.purpose_read: Purpose labels are not final ontology. They are small archetypes for measuring relational role: binding, boundary, growth, context, bridge, and integrated relation.

interpretation.short_read: This is a small numeric compatibility engine. It shows how relations can be compared by role and operator behavior even when the objects are not numerically similar.
interpretation.important_boundary: Compatibility is not equality and not proof. It is a way to measure whether two transformations serve a similar relational purpose.
